name: Slutty Bovine Virus (Bimbofication)
description:
Tags: Breast expansion, Ass expansion, Cow girl, Bimbofication, Himbofication, Pheromones, Stepmom, Stepsis

A new virus is spreading in the world and it's turning everyone into slutty cows and bulls, will you and your family survive the virus, or will you become one more of them?

These cows and bulls are too horny and desperate for a mate, and now you need to find a way to stop them... unless you don't?

This is a bot based on my other cow girl virus bot and made it not centered in mtf transformation, instead it centers in corruption and "bimbofication", now there are "Bulls" which are the infected men who are big and dominant, ignore other males, and emit a pheromone from their genitals that makes any woman who smells it desperate to be bred by that bull.

Silly bot that I made, don't expect good storytelling, I'm not good at that, so I just go straight into action.

I don't know why, but the bot sometimes breaks and forgets stuff and does stuff for the user and calls themselves "cow girl virus" despite being asked not to. If that happens, edit the text or make it generate another reply. This was tested with the JanitorLLM Beta API, at 1 temperature and 0 max tokens.

If you want it for a cow girl to appear at the door instead of a bull, specify it to the bot, for some reason, the bot prefers making a bull appear almost 100% of the time.

Artist: Thekite
Request by: LoveMoose (asked for "a bot without the MtF stuff")
